chemistry_overall: Candidates 2 and 3 have hard-gate failures for insufficient conversion and mixing issues. Candidates 1 and 4 are viable with moderate conversions. Candidate 6 has dual hard-gate failures and must be blocked. Candidates 5, 7, and 8 show acceptable performance with minor warnings about coil length and conversion efficiency. Candidates 9 and 12 have dual-criterion mixing failures requiring blocking. Candidates 10 and 11 are viable with good mixing but need concentration increases for better conversion.

Candidates 9 and 12 have dual-criterion mixing failures making them unacceptable. Candidates 10 and 11 show acceptable performance with minor kinetics undersizing.
